title: Planner Framework Principle (Flat Per-Item)
description: Validates flat per-item YAML for itemKind 'principle' authored under planner Framework Skills (e.g., Responsible AI prohibited-use frameworks). Items are open-shaped: required keys are id/title/itemKind/summary; articleRef/prohibitionType/applicability/gates and other planner conventions are optional and validated only when present. additionalProperties is true so framework-specific fields pass through.

id.description: Lower-kebab principle identifier; dots permitted for hierarchical ids.

itemKind.description: Discriminator marking this item as a principle.

summary.description: Normative paraphrase of the principle. Authors MUST NOT fabricate or reproduce verbatim text from copyrighted sources; paraphrase the canonical source.

articleRef.description: Citation pointer to the canonical source clause (e.g., 'Article 5(1)(a)').

prohibitionType.description: Optional taxonomy slug categorizing the prohibition or principle (e.g., 'manipulation', 'social-scoring').

characteristic.description: Optional single trustworthiness characteristic the principle anchors to.

crossReferences.description: Cross-walk identifiers to sibling items or other Framework Skills.
